description: Bugfix cycle 1 for Milestone 17 — Remove Features. Fixes 1 defect (DEF-001: 9 M17-introduced ruff lint errors) found in QA review.

userStories.title: Fix: Ruff lint errors introduced by M17
userStories.description: Fix defect DEF-001 from QA report qa-m17-remove-features.md — 9 ruff lint errors introduced by M17 file modifications
acceptanceCriteria: Fix unused variable `idea` in services/gateway/apps/ideas/views.py:356 (remove or use it)
ruff check services/ has no NEW errors compared to pre-M17 baseline (10 pre-existing errors are acceptable)
userStories.notes: Defect: DEF-001. Files: services/gateway/apps/comments/views.py:7 (F401 unused Q), services/gateway/apps/ideas/views.py:356 (F841 unused idea variable), services/ai/grpc_server/server.py:139 (I001), services/ai/grpc_server/servicers/processing_servicer.py:92 (I001), services/gateway/apps/chat/views.py:54 (I001), services/gateway/grpc_clients/ai_client.py:3 (I001), services/gateway/grpc_clients/core_client.py:164 (I001), services/gateway/apps/collaboration/views.py:204 (E501), services/gateway/grpc_clients/core_client.py:229 (E501). Suggested fix: Run `ruff check services/ --fix` to auto-fix 7 fixable errors (I001, F401). Manually fix F841 by either removing the unused `idea` assignment or using the variable. Fix E501 by wrapping long lines.
